raw_text: ole alvaro esteban vinado date of birth: 12 / 05 / 1989 telephone: 609 10 34 11 e-mail: alvar1989@gmail.com education 2007-2012 master of science in aerospace engineering. universidad politécnica de madrid, spain. currently doing the final project on the "preliminary design of a wind turbine". completed the five courses. specialty aerospace (a-2). e assistance to the seminar lean manufacturing taught by the chair of eads in etsia in december 2010. e assistance student space spanish v held in madrid in november 2010. e participation in athens program for a week in paris in march 2009. contents: chaos, quantum and automatons. 2005-2007 upper secondary studies in science and technology (with honors). professional experience e inter in gmv during the months of july and august 2011. workspace: control of geostationary satellites. e teacher of mathematics and physics. e lifeguard in public and private pools. e assistant mounting scenarios. computing work enviroments: windows / macintosh. m. office programs: high level management of excel, word and powerpoint. matlab: high level. solid-edge (3d and 2d design): high level management of all settings. maple, fortran 90, lyx and stk. languages e spanish: first language e english: comparable to advance. title: first certificate in english cambridge esol. host-family stays in the uk and malta, improvement from 2002 to 2005. e french: comparable to b-1 (written, spoken). additional information - driving license and own car. - availability to travel. - common practice of sport.
